review_summary: The translation correctly preserves all Greek, Hebrew, Latin, and German spans, adheres to the glossary requirement, and renders Dutch Scripture references (Jes., Hd., Hand.) into standard English forms (Isa., Acts). The prose is coherent formal theological English throughout. One minor syntactic awkwardness with 'namely' at sentence-end does not impede comprehension or doctrinal clarity.
